message:
fix(remote,stream): add RemoteHandle Drop impl, fix dedup window u128 truncation

Two bugs found during fresh-eyes audit batch 1qfd0.529:

1. HIGH: RemoteHandle::join() cancel path (RecvError::Cancelled) did not
   set completed=true or call clear_runtime_state(). If the handle was
   subsequently dropped, runtime state leaked permanently. Added Drop
   impl that calls clear_runtime_state() when !completed, matching the
   cleanup contract of the Ok and Closed paths.

2. MEDIUM: Stream::check_dedup() cast window.as_nanos() (u128) to u64
   via 'as', silently truncating for durations > ~584 years. Changed to
   u64::try_from().unwrap_or(u64::MAX) for consistency with the
   identical pattern already used in enforce_retention().

Also: rustfmt fix in net/worker_channel.rs, 16 audit index entries.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
